texto: If you love the backs of cereal boxes or still recall how much you loved the Archie comics, share all that with your child. Ingesting words, like fruit and vegetables, is just plain good for us, no matter where they are coming from.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Pam Allyn: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “If you love the backs of cereal boxes or still recall how much you loved the Archie comics, share…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, children, reading pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reading.
